mdtools.failure_summary: The mdtools-only run reached the turn cap and failed under both scorers. Its final document did not match the expected heading tree or block order for the subsection relocation.

hybrid.success_summary: The hybrid run completed the certificate-rotation subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the turn cap after placing `### Certificate Rotation` after `### Maintenance Window` instead of immediately before it, producing heading-tree, block-order, and block-text mismatches under both scorers.

notes: The candidate produced a raw +100pp hybrid-minus-unix result and the unix failure was labeled AST-structural.
The family is still rejected because mdtools mode failed the seed, so it cannot satisfy the T10 promotion gate requiring at least one mdtools win.
